spec.description: Puppet Forge service dashboard covering HTTP traffic, module inventory, publish/delete operations, upstream sync/cache health, Go runtime, and Prometheus scrape metadata.

spec.title: Service Up
spec.description: Ratio of selected Puppet Forge scrape targets that are up.

spec.title: Targets
spec.description: Number of selected Puppet Forge targets.

spec.title: Indexed Modules
spec.description: Number of modules indexed by the service.

spec.title: Request Rate
spec.description: Total HTTP request rate.

spec.title: 5xx Error Ratio
spec.description: HTTP 5xx ratio excluding scrape and health routes.

spec.title: In-Flight Requests
spec.description: Current in-flight HTTP requests.

spec.title: Publish Errors
spec.description: Publish error rate.

spec.title: Delete Errors
spec.description: Delete error rate.

spec.title: Upstream Refresh Errors
spec.description: Upstream refresh cycle error rate.

spec.title: Last Successful Refresh Age
spec.description: Seconds since the last fully successful upstream refresh.

spec.title: Requests by Route
spec.description: HTTP request rate grouped by normalized route.

spec.title: 5xx Error Ratio by Route
spec.description: HTTP 5xx ratio by normalized route.

spec.expr: (sum by (route) (rate(puppet_forge_http_requests_total{job=~"$job",status=~"5..",route!~"/metrics|/healthz|/readyz"}[5m])) / clamp_min(sum by (route) (rate(puppet_forge_http_requests_total{job=~"$job",route!~"/metrics|/healthz|/readyz"}[5m])), 0.001)) or on (route) (0 * sum by (route) (rate(puppet_forge_http_requests_total{job=~"$job",route!~"/metrics|/healthz|/readyz"}[5m]))) or label_replace(vector(0), "route", "no traffic", "", "")

spec.title: P95 Latency by Route
spec.description: HTTP p95 latency by normalized route.

spec.title: Responses by Status
spec.description: HTTP response rate by status code.

spec.title: Publish Attempts
spec.description: Publish attempts counted per dashboard interval by owner and result.

spec.expr: sum by (result, owner) (increase(puppet_forge_publish_total{job=~"$job"}[$__rate_interval])) or label_replace(label_replace(vector(0), "owner", "none", "", ""), "result", "no events", "", "")

spec.title: Delete Attempts
spec.description: Delete attempts counted per dashboard interval by owner, kind, and result.

spec.expr: sum by (result, kind, owner) (increase(puppet_forge_delete_total{job=~"$job"}[$__rate_interval])) or label_replace(label_replace(label_replace(vector(0), "owner", "none", "", ""), "kind", "none", "", ""), "result", "no events", "", "")

spec.title: Release Usage Marks
spec.description: Release usage mark attempts counted per dashboard interval by owner and result.

spec.expr: sum by (result, owner) (increase(puppet_forge_release_usage_mark_total{job=~"$job"}[$__rate_interval])) or label_replace(label_replace(vector(0), "owner", "none", "", ""), "result", "no events", "", "")

spec.title: Upstream Refresh Cycles
spec.description: Upstream refresh cycles counted over the selected dashboard time range by result.

spec.title: Upstream Cache Requests
spec.description: Upstream JSON/artifact cache decisions counted per dashboard interval.

spec.title: Upstream Cache Hit Ratio
spec.description: Cache hit ratio by cache kind.

spec.expr: (sum by (kind) (increase(puppet_forge_upstream_cache_requests_total{job=~"$job",result="hit"}[$__rate_interval])) / clamp_min(sum by (kind) (increase(puppet_forge_upstream_cache_requests_total{job=~"$job",result=~"hit|miss|stale"}[$__rate_interval])), 0.001)) or on (kind) (0 * sum by (kind) (increase(puppet_forge_upstream_cache_requests_total{job=~"$job"}[$__rate_interval]))) or label_replace(vector(0), "kind", "json", "", "") or label_replace(vector(0), "kind", "artifact", "", "")

spec.title: Last Upstream Refresh Duration
spec.description: Duration of the most recent upstream refresh cycle.

spec.title: Upstream Refresh Modules
spec.description: Module counts from the most recent upstream refresh cycle.

spec.title: Indexed Modules
spec.description: Modules indexed by the service and their latest known version.

spec.title: Scrape Up
spec.description: Prometheus target up status.

spec.title: Scrape Duration
spec.description: Prometheus scrape duration.

spec.title: Scrape Samples
spec.description: Samples scraped per target.

spec.title: Scrape Series Added
spec.description: New series added by scrape.

spec.title: Process CPU
spec.description: Process CPU usage rate.

spec.title: Resident Memory
spec.description: Process resident memory.

spec.title: Heap Allocated
spec.description: Go heap allocation.

spec.title: Goroutines
spec.description: Go goroutines.

spec.title: GC Rate
spec.description: Go GC cycles per second.

spec.title: Average GC Pause
spec.description: Average GC pause duration.

spec.title: Open FDs
spec.description: Open file descriptors.

spec.title: FD Usage Ratio
spec.description: Open file descriptor usage ratio.

spec.title: Threads
spec.description: Go OS threads.

spec.title: Heap Objects
spec.description: Go heap object count.

spec.title: Allocation Rate
spec.description: Go allocation byte rate.

spec.title: Network I/O
spec.description: Process network receive/transmit byte rate when process network collectors are available.

spec.title: Modules by Owner
spec.description: Indexed modules grouped by owner.

spec.title: Releases by Source
spec.description: Indexed releases grouped by source.

spec.title: Latest Releases by Source
spec.description: Latest known releases grouped by source.

spec.title: Total Releases
spec.description: Total indexed releases over the selected time range.

spec.title: Latest Releases
spec.description: Latest indexed releases over the selected time range.

spec.title: Modules by Owner
spec.description: Indexed modules grouped by owner over the selected time range.

spec.title: Release Usage Marks
spec.description: Release usage marks over the selected time range.

spec.title: Publish Attempts
spec.description: Publish attempts over the selected time range.

spec.title: Delete Attempts
spec.description: Delete attempts over the selected time range.

spec.title: Refresh Cycles
spec.description: Upstream refresh cycles over the selected time range.

spec.title: Cache Hit Ratio
spec.description: Overall upstream cache hit ratio over the selected time range.

spec.title: Scrape Duration
spec.description: Maximum Prometheus scrape duration over the selected time range.

spec.title: Scrape Samples
spec.description: Maximum scraped samples over the selected time range.

spec.title: Version
spec.description: Current puppet-forge version from puppet_forge_build_info.

spec.title: Puppet Forge

spec.name: job
spec.label: job
spec.description: Prometheus scrape job exposing Puppet Forge metrics
